title: stisseria dejecta
intro: Stisseria dejecta, also known as False Pleurisy Root, is a perennial plant that belongs to the Asclepiadaceae family. It is native to North America and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and soothing digestive problems. Herbal preparations of Stisseria dejecta often involve drying and powdering the root, which can be used in teas, tinctures, or capsules to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
